chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-219 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.06.2023 Mr. Imam Ali Chang advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh along with SIP Yar Muhammad SHO PS Akri District Khairpur. ----- Mr. Amjad Ali Rajpar advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.4, which is taken on record. Minors have been produced by SIP Yar Muhammad SHO PS Akri District Khairpur. They are minors and appear to be used to petitioner, their mother. Accordingly, the custody of minors is handed over to applicant. However, as an when respondent No.4 who is their real father intends to visit the minors, applicant would allow him to visit them in her own house. Petition by consent is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
